svg.title: Module 8 hero: Unified Storage — three protocols on one cluster
svg.desc: Three client streams — SMB/NFS file clients in purple, S3 object clients in cyan, and iSCSI initiators in gold — converge on three service-VM bands (FSVM, Object Service, Volumes) floating above a single Nutanix cluster, with DSF as the shared substrate underneath.

g.text: SINGLE NUTANIX CLUSTER · 6 NODES · ONE PLATFORM
DSF · DISTRIBUTED STORAGE FABRIC · RF · COMPRESSION · DEDUP · SNAPSHOTS
NetApp + Cloudian + Pure-iSCSI + Data-Domain → Files + Objects + Volumes on shared DSF
